message: Validation timeout kills only the sh wrapper, so foreground child commands can continue running after the gate records a timeout.
evidence: The new code runs validation via exec.CommandContext(ctx, "sh", "-c", commandText) without process-group cleanup; context cancellation targets the started shell process, not necessarily children spawned by shell syntax.

message: Validation-command timeout behavior is not covered by tests after switching validation execution to `sh -c`.
evidence: The added shell-feature test proves command substitution, but no gate test exercises validation command timeout behavior; existing timeout assertions only cover execution attempt records.

message: The failing validation-command test does not assert the non-zero exit code written to `gate/validation/command_001/result.json`.
evidence: The failure test asserts the gate report exit code is 7 but never reads the validation result JSON artifact, leaving one contract acceptance criterion untested.

message: The backlog still describes validation command quote parsing as an active strings.Fields bug even though this change now runs validation commands through sh -c.
evidence: docs/backlog.md lines 375-382 say the gate tokenizes validation commands with strings.Fields and should fix quote-aware tokenization; internal/app/gate.go line 543 now uses exec.CommandContext(ctx, "sh", "-c", commandText).
